title: Light Goes In (Reprise)
lyrics: Oh, feel it just inside of your zone. We know this won't keep the story in our react. Let's pray for everybody who came before us in the zone and then you'll see. [Music] But the journey moves you far and comfort in the fact that you were through. That dark and bright came back. It made you more than you'd ever want to feel and shout about. And give it to others Don't be selfish with the gift that you've found To your struggles because Everybody needs to feel that warmth universe there's more than us and there's more than you so give it
